summary: Attempt to navigate below the Log In button
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in
AND the user is on the "Purchase" page for a package tile

steps.action: WHEN the user attempts to navigate down from the Log In button
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "There is no selectable content available to the bottom of the current position. However, the footer reads <footer_text>."
